channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran to Lebanon: Four million people displaced by US-Israeli war
item.description: Three million Iranians and at least a million Lebanese have been forced from their homes because of US-Israeli attacks.

item.title: Germany warns of world economic ‘catastrophe’; OECD cuts UK growth forecast
item.description: European powers and bodies warn of economic collapse as the war on Iran nears one-month mark.

item.title: Iranian naval commander Alireza Tangsiri killed in attack, Israel says
item.description: Defence minister claims Israel kills Alireza Tangsiri, citing his role in blocking the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: ‘Missile hit’ flips car in Israel
item.description: Surveillance footage shows a car overturning due to 'falling rocket debris in central Israel'.

item.title: Amid US-Israel war, Iran football team trains in Turkiye before World Cup
item.description: Iran will play two friendly matches in Turkiye as they prepare for the FIFA World Cup in the US, Canada and Mexico.

item.title: ‘He will call me Mama’: The Gaza ‘grandmother’ raising an orphaned baby
item.description: Maha was 'Grandmother' in her family until she adopted Hamza, born the day an Israeli air strike killed his parents.

item.title: Helium hitch: Why US-Israel war on Iran could cause MRI scan delays
item.description: Shortage of helium will have ripple effects across medical and other industries.

item.title: German minister calls Iran war an ‘economic catastrophe’
item.description: Germany’s defence minister, Boris Pistorius, says the economic impact of the war is "absolutely evident".

item.title: Two teenagers killed in Shiraz, two dead in Abu Dhabi as Iran war expands
item.description: Deadly attacks rise as Israel announces strikes on Isfahan and as Trump and Tehran debate ceasefire terms.

item.title: US-Israel war on Iran: What’s happening on day 27 of attacks?
item.description: The US and Israel’s war on Iran is intensifying, as Trump again claims Iranian leaders want to 'make a deal'.
